name: Structured Denim Jeans
description: Classic straight-leg jeans crafted from rigid raw denim. Designed to wear in beautifully over time, featuring a button fly and five-pocket styling.

name: Layered Cotton Tee
description: A double-layered t-shirt offering a modern layered contrast look at the sleeves and hem. Made from premium lightweight pima cotton.

name: Linen Summer Shirt
description: Cut for a relaxed fit, this short-sleeve summer shirt is crafted from 100% breathable flax linen. Features a resort collar and a curved hem.

name: Knitted Zip Polo
description: A contemporary knit polo featuring a metal quarter-zip closure, ribbed collar, and fine-gauge knit structure in a rich olive-gray hue.
